subcodes.first_line: O friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! From His grace and supreme bounty do I beseech for you heavenly gifts and the nurturing rain of His bestowals [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء از فضل و موهبت کبری شما را بخشش آسمانی طلبم و پرورش باران
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
